pages.text: This Dream Weaver has two effects. First, it will add a short $(item)Weakness$() effect to a player when they wake up from a good nights sleep. Second, it will corrupt any nearby Dream Weavers so that their effect is inverted.

pages.title: Corrupting Nightmares
pages.text: If the Dream Weaver of Nightmares itself is corrupted by another Dream Weaver of Nightmares, a short $(item)Blindness$() potion effect is given to waking up players instead of $(item)Nausea$()

pages.title: Bane of Nightmares
pages.text: The Dream Weaver of Nightmares can also be used to fend off nightmares when a $(l:kettle/kettle_intro#sleeping)Brew of Sleeping$(/l) is drunk. Having the Dream Weaver nearby will reduce the chance of a nightmare to 50%.
